channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anne Hathaway says she received ChatGPT-written thank you notes from job applicants
item.description: Hathaway received identical AI-generated thank you notes from every candidate, prompting Meryl Streep to call it tragic.

item.title: Kevin Warsh's hawkish stance: Key rate insights for CEOs today
item.description: Also includes all the latest news and watercooler chatter from Fortune.

item.title: CFO retirements reshape Fortune 500 as AT&T's Pascal Desroches steps down
item.description: Jennifer Biry appointed as AT&T's next CFO, bringing telecom, tech, and operational expertise.

item.title: Meet the CEO of US Polo Assn: From one of America's poorest regions to hosting Prince William and leading a $2.7 billion brand
item.description: The U.S. Polo Assn. CEO studied accounting when others were abandoning it, leading to a $2.7 billion career in luxury fashion.
